recent_projects.name: abstract-utilities
recent_projects.summary: abstract_utilities is a collection of utility modules providing a variety of functions to aid in tasks such as data comparison, list manipulation, JSON handling, string manipulation, mathematical computations, and time operations.
recent_projects.author: putkoff

recent_projects.summary: Biblioteca para construção de APIs Rest Python, de acordo com o guidelines interno, e com paradigma declarativo.
recent_projects.author: Nasajon Sistemas

recent_projects.author: Jonathan Anderson

recent_projects.summary: Complex modeling infrastructure: a modular framework for multi-modal modeling of scientific data.

recent_projects.name: sleipnirgroup-jormungandr

recent_projects.name: scantool
recent_projects.summary: MCP server for multi-language code analysis with structure extraction, metadata parsing, and search capabilities across Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Rust, Go, C/C++, Java, PHP, C#, Ruby, Markdown, plain text, and images
recent_projects.author: Marius Berge Eide
